'''wamuthu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pykar|pykar]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-m-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pykar|pykar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| wamuthu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæmithith|wæmithith]] || [[word:wæmithij|wæmithij]] || [[word:wæmithish|wæmithish]] || [[word:wæmithi|wæmithi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wamumuthuth|wamumuthuth]] || [[word:wamumuthuj|wamumuthuj]] || [[word:wamumuthush|wamumuthush]] || [[word:wamumuthu|wamumuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wamuthuth|wamuthuth]] || [[word:wamuthuj|wamuthuj]] || [[word:wamuthush|wamuthush]] || [[word:wamuthu|wamuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wamufthuth|wamufthuth]] || [[word:wamufthuj|wamufthuj]] || [[word:wamufthush|wamufthush]] || [[word:wamufthuf|wamufthuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wamuthuthu|wamuthuthu]] || [[word:wamuthuju|wamuthuju]] || [[word:wamuthushu|wamuthushu]] || [[word:wamuthuku|wamuthuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wamuthuth|wamuthuth]] || [[word:wamuthuj|wamuthuj]] || [[word:wamuthush|wamuthush]] || [[word:wamuthu|wamuthu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wamuthuthul|wamuthuthul]] || [[word:wamuthujul|wamuthujul]] || [[word:wamuthushul|wamuthushul]] || [[word:wamuthukul|wamuthukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wamuthuthuthu|wamuthuthuthu]] || [[word:wamuthujuju|wamuthujuju]] || [[word:wamuthushushu|wamuthushushu]] || [[word:wamuthuku|wamuthuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wamuthuthun|wamuthuthun]] || [[word:wamuthujun|wamuthujun]] || [[word:wamuthushun|wamuthushun]] || [[word:wamuthukun|wamuthukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wamuthuthuoro|wamuthuthuoro]] || [[word:wamuthujuoro|wamuthujuoro]] || [[word:wamuthushuoro|wamuthushuoro]] || [[word:wamuthukuoro|wamuthukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
